# Stage 1 — Rendu du rapport Rmd
FROM rocker/tidyverse:4.3.3 AS builder

# rocker/tidyverse inclut déjà : rmarkdown, knitr, ggplot2, dplyr, tidyr, scales, forcats
RUN Rscript -e "install.packages(c('kableExtra','corrplot','broom','gridExtra'), repos='https://cran.rstudio.com/')"

WORKDIR /project
COPY data/ data/
COPY src/  src/

RUN Rscript -e "rmarkdown::render('src/rapport.Rmd', output_dir='/project', output_file='rapport.html')"

# Stage 2 — Serveur nginx (léger, fiable)
FROM nginx:alpine
COPY --from=builder /project/rapport.html /usr/share/nginx/html/rapport.html

EXPOSE 80
